title: ICAI's Latest Move: Disciplinary Action for Extremely Low Tender Fees (Dated July 02, 2026)
content:
# ICAI's Latest Move: Disciplinary Action for Extremely Low Tender Fees (Dated July 02, 2026)

Ek important update hai humare profession ke liye! The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) ne announce kiya hai ki CA firms jo tenders mein "extremely low" fees quote karti hain, unpar ab disciplinary action ho sakta hai. Yeh decision professional ethics aur fair competition maintain karne ke liye liya gaya hai.

Here's a quick rundown of what you need to know:

*   **What's New:** ICAI Council ne decide kiya hai ki agar koi member ya CA firm tender mein aisi fees quote karti hai jo kaam ke size, value, volume, manpower requirement aur nature se commensurate nahi hai, toh yeh matter Director (Discipline) ko refer kiya ja sakta hai for appropriate action.
*   **Why this move:** Is step ka main objective hai unhealthy price competition ko discourage karna aur professional standards maintain karna. It ensures that fee quotations reflect the actual resources, expertise, and responsibilities required for an assignment.
*   **Scope:** Yeh decision sabhi tarah ke tenders par लागू hoga, chahe woh services specifically CAs ke liye reserved hon ya nahi.

Basically, ICAI wants to ensure quality and prevent a race to the bottom when it comes to professional fees. So, next time, bids carefully!
